parameters.design: 3 methods x 4 strategies x 2 budgets (13 conditions after pruning)

prediction_outcome: Scenario B (partially confirmed): zero_v worst on Llama (51.9%), but mask < zero_kv for H2O was NOT predicted. The surprising finding that H2O=random under masking was completely unpredicted.
key_finding: Attention-based selection (H2O) = random under true masking (both 66.7% on Llama). H2O advantage under zeroing (+14.8pp) is an artifact of model self-organizing around high-K-norm positions. Phantom routing confirmed (zero_v=51.9% worst). 'Recent' uniquely method-invariant (100% everywhere). Qwen method-invariant (digital encoding).
evidence_impact: Added findings #70-74. Added disconfirmed claim: 'masking strictly better than zeroing'. Phantom routing replicated with 3-way comparison. H2O selection mechanism exposed.
next_planned: Test whether H2O with true attention scores (not K-norm proxy) improves under masking; explore hybrid recent+head_selective strategy; investigate why recent strategy is uniquely robust

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama. Head x position ENCODING-DEPENDENT.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent. CASCADING IS GENERAL on Llama.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL at per-head level: 16/16 heads across 2 models. V=456/456 absolute. K>V does NOT translate directly to compression.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama. Head-selective compression +8.7pp over H2O.

natural_usage.status: ADVANCED: Two eviction benchmarks complete. Mask vs zero: zeroing > masking for imperfect selection. H2O=random under masking (attention-based selection exposed). 'Recent' uniquely method-invariant.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 variants. Eviction benchmark on 2 models with 3 methods.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + compression + method implications: digital=method-invariant, analog=method-sensitive. Zeroing > masking for imperfect selection on analog.
